headline: Agoda Delhi Tourism Deal And What It May Mean For Booking Holders
summary: Agoda, part of Booking Holdings, has entered a partnership with the Delhi Tourism & Transportation Development Corporation. The collaboration aims to promote Delhi as a year round global tourist destination. The agreement focuses on driving new travel demand and supporting the broader tourism economy in India. For investors tracking Booking Holdings (NasdaqGS:BKNG), this move points to activity that goes beyond core booking platform operations. The stock closed at $163.3, with a value score...

headline: Agoda Recommends Top Destinations for Dragon Boat Festival 2026
summary: Digital travel platform Agoda highlights unique destinations to experience the Dragon Boat Festival in 2026. Falling on 19 June this year, this traditional festival is celebrated on the fifth day of the fifth lunar month, and commemorates ancient Chinese poet Qu Yuan. The festival is marked by vibrant dragon boat races and the preparation of zongzi, a type of sticky rice dumpling. Travelers can explore a mix of lesser-known cities and vibrant regions across Asia to enjoy the festivities and cult

headline: Agoda and Philippines Department of Tourism announce strategic partnership to promote and elevate tourism
summary: Digital travel platform Agoda and the Philippines Department of Tourism (DOT) announced a strategic partnership to promote Philippine tourism, while advance workforce development, strengthen sustainable tourism practices, and enable data‑driven policy and marketing collaboration.
